case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. FRED MUSNI et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUSNI, FRED $4,165.55 PRINCIPAL, $915.40 INTEREST, $290.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,371.45, SEE SCANNED DOC

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-21-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
